allow: PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "C:\\Users\\OFFICE DEPOT\\iSolve-Dashboard" | Where-Object { $_.Name -ne "node_modules" } | Select-Object Name, LastWriteTime)
PowerShell($r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:3000/api/adj-post-date?dFrom=1/1/2024&dTo=12/31/2025" -UseBasicParsing; if \($r.Count -gt 0\) { $r[0] | ConvertTo-Json } else { "Sin datos" })

PowerShell($r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:3000/api/adj-post-date?dFrom=1/1/2023&dTo=5/6/2026"; "Total: $\($r.Count\)"; $r | Group-Object Season_Name | Select-Object Name, Count | Sort-Object Name)

PowerShell($r = Invoke-RestMethod "http://localhost:3000/api/expenses?dFrom=1/1/2020&dTo=5/6/2026"; $r | Group-Object Season_Name | Select-Object Name, Count, @{N='Total';E={\($_.Group | Measure-Object Amount -Sum\).Sum}} | Sort-Object Name | Format-Table -AutoSize)

PowerShell($r = Invoke-RestMethod "http://localhost:3000/api/expenses?dFrom=1/1/2020&dTo=5/6/2026"; $r | Group-Object Concept_Name | Select-Object Name, Count, @{N='Total';E={\($_.Group | Measure-Object Amount -Sum\).Sum}} | Sort-Object Total -Descending | Format-Table -AutoSize)
PowerShell($r = Invoke-RestMethod "http://localhost:3000/api/expenses-by-season"; $r.rows | Select-Object concept, total | Sort-Object total -Descending | Format-Table -AutoSize)

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "C:\\Users\\OFFICE DEPOT\\Desktop" -File -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.Extension -in @\('.png','.jpg','.jpeg','.svg'\) } | Select-Object Name, FullName, Length)

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "C:\\Users\\OFFICE DEPOT\\OneDrive" -Recurse -File -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.Extension -in @\('.png','.jpg','.jpeg','.svg'\) -and $_.Name -match 'h2e|logo|H2E|Logo|crown|Crown' } | Select-Object Name, FullName, LastWriteTime)

PowerShell($r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:3000/api/statement?season=2025/2026" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($r\) { Write-Host "suppAsOf: $\($r.suppAsOf\)"; Write-Host "sentToRepack: $\($r.packages.sentToRepackStd\)"; Write-Host "receivedFromRepack: $\($r.packages.receivedFromRepackStd\)"; Write-Host "dumped: $\($r.packages.dumpedStd\)"; Write-Host "pendingCash: $\($r.sales.pendingCashReceipts\)" } else { Write-Host "No response" })

PowerShell($r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:3000/api/statement?season=2025/2026" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Host "receivedStd: $\($r.packages.receivedStd\)"; Write-Host "pkgsInvoicedStd \(spQtyS\): $\($r.packages.pkgsInvoicedStd\)"; Write-Host "pendingToInvoice \(invQty\): $\($r.packages.pendingToInvoiceStd\)"; Write-Host "shippedStd \(ssQtyS\): $\($r.packages.shippedStd\)")

PowerShell($now = Get-Date; $dTo = "$\($now.Month\)/$\($now.Day\)/$\($now.Year\)"; $inv = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:3000/api/inventory?dAsOf=$dTo" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; $s26 = $inv | Where-Object { $_.'Season_Name' -eq '2025/2026' }; Write-Host "2025/2026 inventory rows: $\($s26.Count\)"; Write-Host "Total Qty: $\(\($s26 | Measure-Object -Property Qty -Sum\).Sum\)")

PowerShell(cd "C:\\Users\\OFFICE DEPOT\\iSolve-Dashboard"; $proc = Start-Process -FilePath "node" -ArgumentList "server.js" -WorkingDirectory "C:\\Users\\OFFICE DEPOT\\iSolve-Dashboard" -RedirectStandardError "C:\\Users\\OFFICE DEPOT\\iSolve-Dashboard\\server-err.log" -RedirectStandardOutput "C:\\Users\\OFFICE DEPOT\\iSolve-Dashboard\\server-out.log" -PassThru -NoNewWindow; Start-Sleep -Seconds 8; Write-Host "Still running: $\(-not $proc.HasExited\)"; Get-Content "C:\\Users\\OFFICE DEPOT\\iSolve-Dashboard\\server-out.log" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Get-Content "C:\\Users\\OFFICE DEPOT\\iSolve-Dashboard\\server-err.log" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue)

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -Path "C:\\Users\\OFFICE DEPOT\\iSolve-Dashboard" -File | Where-Object { $_.Name -notmatch 'node_modules|package|server|generate|README|H2E_Sales' } | Select-Object Name, LastWriteTime | Sort-Object LastWriteTime -Descending)

PowerShell($r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:3000/api/statement-by-season" -TimeoutSec 40; $s = "2024/2025"; $d = $r.data."2024/2025"; Write-Host "expTotal: $\($d.expTotal\)"; Write-Host "wiresTotal: $\($d.wiresTotal\)"; Write-Host "netSales: $\($d.netSales\)"; Write-Host "balance: $\($d.balance\)"; Write-Host "---expenses keys---"; $d.expenses.PSObject.Properties | ForEach-Object { Write-Host "'$\($_.Name\)' = $\($_.Value\)" })
